calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-01-2025 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-23-2025 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Oct-28-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove-Up Hearing In Support Of Plaintiffs Application For Entry Of Default Court Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-04-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to Defendant Nuburu, Inc. et al

Dept. 505; Judge Ronald Quidachay; Clerk: D. Carter;

Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:07am and concluding at 9:10am.

Sam Stockwell, Esq. appeared on behalf of Plaintiff Fictiv, Inc.

No appearance by Defendant Nuburu, Inc. et at.

Mr. Stockwell stated there is a global settlement on this matter and a stipulated judgment would be submitted. He requested this matter goes off calendar.

This matter is off calendar.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-24-2025 Continued To May-14-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR WRIT OF ATTACHMENT And Hearing For Right To Attach Order
Off Calendar Dec-11-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF FICTIV,INC.'S MOTION FOR WRIT OF ATTACHMENT And Hearing For Right To Attach Order.

Off calendar. The moving party failed to provide courtesy copies in compliance with SF Local Rule 2.7B.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (301)
